_doc: Registry for tools/bench_node.sh — the repeatable bench-node runner. THIS file is the public-safe TEMPLATE (placeholders only). Copy it to tools/bench_nodes.json (GITIGNORED) and fill in REAL tailnet IPs / ssh users / repo paths there. Only 'sanitized_name' may ever appear in a committed artifact. Mirrors the fleet_endpoints.example.json convention.
_safety: tools/bench_nodes.json is gitignored — real identity (tailnet_ip, ssh_user, magicdns, repo_path, host_key) lives ONLY there.
Reachability is an SSH handshake, not ICMP/tailscale ping (a node can answer ping with no sshd).
host_key is PINNED here after bootstrap — the driver verifies against it instead of blind accept-new.
Every run writes lineage.json (utc datetime + fak version/commit + node + go) for traceability.

Results go to tools/_registry/bench-runs/ (gitignored). Promoting a result to a committed path needs a REAL redaction pass (CPU brand + go/git + hostname) — the shape-only scrub audit does NOT do that.
